testcase.name: @BeforeClass setUp
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.SessionNotCreatedException: Could not start a new session. Response code 500. Message: session not created: This version of ChromeDriver only supports Chrome version 114 Current browser version is 133.0.6943.142 with binary path C:\Program Files\Google\Chrome\Application\chrome.exe Host info: host: 'INT-QECORE-075', ip: '192.168.1.5' Build info: version: '4.6.0', revision: '79f1c02ae20' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '23.0.2' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [null, newSession {capabilities=[Capabilities {browserName: chrome, goog:chromeOptions: {args: [], extensions: []}}], desiredCapabilities=Capabilities {browserName: chrome, goog:chromeOptions: {args: [], extensions: []}}}] at
